---
title: 'Moved with you car? Bought a car Private Party? Get New Registration & Transfer the Title in Fort Worth Texas'
date: '2015-02-09T04:14:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'The Life In Fort Worth Blog'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '5343855263104734071'
blogger_filename: '/2015/02/auto-registration-and-title_8.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/The Life In Fort Worth Blog/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Navigate'
---

<span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;"><br /></span>
<span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;"><br /></span>
<span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;"><br /></span>
<span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;"><br /></span>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/texastags-d3434e387136.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img alt="Texas Department of Motor Vehicles Tag Example" border="0" height="247" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/texastags-d3434e387136.jpg" title="Texas Department of Motor Vehicles Tag Example" width="400" /></a></span></div>
<span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;"><br /></span>


<br />
<div style="font-size: 11pt; margin: 0in;">
<br /></div>
<span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;">

</span><br />
<h3 style="font-size: 11pt; margin: 0in;">
<span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;">Either you've moved
to Texas recently and brought your car, or you just bought a used Private Party
car. Either way, if you didn't use a dealership you'll be doing the paperwork
yourself. </span></h3>
<span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;">

</span><br />
<div style="font-size: 11pt; margin: 0in;">
<br /></div>
<span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;">

</span><br />
<div style="font-size: 11pt; margin: 0in;">
<span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;">If you are new to
Texas you have 30 days from the time you move here to register your
vehicle<span style="mso-spacerun: yes;">&nbsp; </span>in Texas (not until your tags
expire from your old state). Check out the state <a href="http://www.txdmv.gov/motorists/new-to-texas">New To Texas</a> page here. </span></div>
<span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;">

</span><br />
<div style="font-size: 11pt; margin: 0in;">
<br /></div>
<span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;">

</span><br />
<div style="font-size: 11pt; margin: 0in;">
<span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;">Special Note: Title
and Registration are TWO different things. If you bought a new car you are
paying for both. If you are renewing you are only paying for registration. </span></div>
<span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;">

</span><br />
<div style="font-size: 11pt; margin: 0in;">
<br /></div>
<span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;">

</span><br />
<div style="font-size: 11pt; margin: 0in;">
<span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;">Drivers Licenses
(DL) are NOT processed by the same department as automotive registrations and
titles. If you need a DL, click <a href="http://www.txdps.state.tx.us/">HERE</a>,
for the Texas Department of Public Saftey. </span></div>
<span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;">

</span><br />
<div style="font-size: 11pt; margin: 0in;">
<br /></div>
<span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;">

</span><br />
<div style="font-size: 11pt; margin: 0in;">
<span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;">You'll want to visit
the Texas Department of Motor Vehicles (DMV) website (<a href="http://www.txdmv.gov/motorists/register-your-vehicle">TXDMV.Gov</a>) for
the most up to date information. </span></div>
<span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;">

</span><br />
<div style="font-size: 11pt; margin: 0in;">
<br /></div>
<div style="font-size: 11pt; margin: 0in;">
<br /></div>
<span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;">

</span><br />
<div style="font-size: 11pt; margin: 0in;">
<br /></div>
<span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;">

</span><br />
<h4 style="font-size: 11pt; margin: 0in;">
<span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;">What you will need:</span></h4>
<span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;">

</span><br />
<div style="font-size: 11pt; margin: 0in;">
<br /></div>
<div style="font-size: 11pt; margin: 0in;">
<br /></div>
<span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;">

</span><br />
<ol style="direction: ltr; font-size: 11pt; font-style: normal; font-weight: normal; margin-bottom: 0in; margin-left: 0.375in; margin-top: 0in; unicode-bidi: embed;" type="1">
<li style="margin-bottom: 0; margin-top: 0; vertical-align: middle;" value="1"><span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;"><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-style: normal; font-weight: normal;">Current Inspection, in Texas.
     </span></span></li>
<ol style="direction: ltr; font-size: 11pt; font-style: normal; font-weight: normal; margin-bottom: 0in; margin-left: 0.375in; margin-top: 0in; unicode-bidi: embed;" type="a">
<li style="margin-bottom: 0; margin-top: 0; vertical-align: middle;" value="1"><span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;"><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-style: normal; font-weight: normal;">Most auto shops,
      Jiffy Lube, NTB, etc., do these inspections. </span></span></li>
<li style="margin-bottom: 0; margin-top: 0; vertical-align: middle;"><span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;"><span style="font-size: 11pt;">There used to be an
      inspections sticker, this has gone away as of 03/01/15. The state will
      electronically verify your inspection. </span></span></li>
<li style="margin-bottom: 0; margin-top: 0; vertical-align: middle;"><span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;"><span style="font-size: 11pt;">Once past, keep the
      inspection papers (the VI30 form from the inspection station) to take
      with you to registration. </span></span></li>
</ol>
<li style="margin-bottom: 0; margin-top: 0; vertical-align: middle;"><span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;"><span style="font-size: 11pt;">Insurance Card.</span></span></li>
<ol style="direction: ltr; font-size: 11pt; font-style: normal; font-weight: normal; margin-bottom: 0in; margin-left: 0.375in; margin-top: 0in; unicode-bidi: embed;" type="a">
<li style="margin-bottom: 0; margin-top: 0; vertical-align: middle;" value="1"><span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;"><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-style: normal; font-weight: normal;">Make sure to
      bring your proof of insurance with you. </span></span></li>
</ol>
<li style="margin-bottom: 0; margin-top: 0; vertical-align: middle;"><span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;"><span style="font-size: 11pt;">Proof of ownership.</span></span></li>
<ol style="direction: ltr; font-size: 11pt; font-style: normal; font-weight: normal; margin-bottom: 0in; margin-left: 0.375in; margin-top: 0in; unicode-bidi: embed;" type="a">
<li style="margin-bottom: 0; margin-top: 0; vertical-align: middle;" value="1"><span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;"><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-style: normal; font-weight: normal;">Title (signed
      over to you if you just bought it), registration, foreign/military
      documentation of ownership, etc. </span></span></li>
</ol>
<li style="margin-bottom: 0; margin-top: 0; vertical-align: middle;"><span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;"><span style="font-size: 11pt;">Money. </span></span></li>
<ol style="direction: ltr; font-size: 11pt; font-style: normal; font-weight: normal; margin-bottom: 0in; margin-left: 0.375in; margin-top: 0in; unicode-bidi: embed;" type="a">
<li style="margin-bottom: 0; margin-top: 0; vertical-align: middle;" value="1"><span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;"><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-style: normal; font-weight: normal;">It costs money to
      title and/or register your vehicle. Weird huh? </span></span></li>
<li style="margin-bottom: 0; margin-top: 0; vertical-align: middle;"><span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;"><span style="font-size: 11pt;">Check the costs before you
      go, be prepared. </span></span></li>
</ol>
<li style="margin-bottom: 0; margin-top: 0; vertical-align: middle;"><span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;"><span style="font-size: 11pt;">Check Ahead on Parking.</span></span></li>
<ol style="direction: ltr; font-size: 11pt; font-style: normal; font-weight: normal; margin-bottom: 0in; margin-left: 0.375in; margin-top: 0in; unicode-bidi: embed;" type="a">
<li style="margin-bottom: 0; margin-top: 0; vertical-align: middle;" value="1"><span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;"><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-style: normal; font-weight: normal;">Bring some coins
      (quarters) for parking. Most buildings near government areas will have
      metered parking. </span></span></li>
</ol>
<li style="margin-bottom: 0; margin-top: 0; vertical-align: middle;"><span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;"><span style="font-size: 11pt;">Signatures!!!</span></span></li>
<ol style="direction: ltr; font-size: 11pt; font-style: normal; font-weight: normal; margin-bottom: 0in; margin-left: 0.375in; margin-top: 0in; unicode-bidi: embed;" type="a">
<li style="margin-bottom: 0; margin-top: 0; vertical-align: middle;" value="1"><span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;"><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-style: normal; font-weight: normal;">You donâ€™t want to
      be turned away for missing signatures and have to come back. </span></span></li>
<li style="margin-bottom: 0; margin-top: 0; vertical-align: middle;"><span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;"><span style="font-size: 11pt;">Two People on
      Title/Registration? </span></span></li>
<ol style="direction: ltr; font-size: 11pt; font-style: normal; font-weight: normal; margin-bottom: 0in; margin-left: 0.375in; margin-top: 0in; unicode-bidi: embed;" type="i">
<li style="margin-bottom: 0; margin-top: 0; vertical-align: middle;" value="1"><span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;"><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-style: normal; font-weight: normal;">You don't both
       need to be there, per-say. It could be better that you are. If you
       aren't both coming, at least bring both signatures on all paperwork
       ahead of time. It would be good to check all the things you need. Call
       if you're not sure. </span></span></li>
</ol>
<li style="margin-bottom: 0; margin-top: 0; vertical-align: middle;"><span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;"><span style="font-size: 11pt;">Seller Signatures</span></span></li>
<ol style="direction: ltr; font-size: 11pt; font-style: normal; font-weight: normal; margin-bottom: 0in; margin-left: 0.375in; margin-top: 0in; unicode-bidi: embed;" type="i">
<li style="margin-bottom: 0; margin-top: 0; vertical-align: middle;" value="1"><span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;"><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-style: normal; font-weight: normal;">If you bought a
       car Private Party. The Seller needs to sign the</span><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-style: normal; font-weight: bold;">
       Title<span style="mso-spacerun: yes;">&nbsp; </span>AND the title transfer
       form/application (</span><a href="http://www.txdmv.gov/component/docman/doc_download/998-130-u-application-for-texas-title?Itemid=232"><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-weight: bold;">130-U</span></a><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-style: normal; font-weight: bold;">)</span><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-style: normal; font-weight: normal;">. Print these
       when you go so that you can get the signatures. You may have to drive
       back to the seller if you don't get them. </span></span></li>
<li style="margin-bottom: 0; margin-top: 0; vertical-align: middle;"><span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;"><span style="font-size: 11pt;">Missing Title? Also bring a
       </span><a href="http://www.txdmv.gov/component/docman/doc_download/1002-vtr-272-application-for-registration-purposes-only-for-a-vehicle-that-was-last-registered-or-titled-out-of-state-that-is-eligible-for-texas-registration?Itemid=232"><span style="font-size: 11pt;">VTR-272</span></a><span style="font-size: 11pt;"> form to apply for a new
       title. This will be signed by you only, but will be used in conjunction
       with the 130-U that the Seller needs to sign! </span></span></li>
</ol>
</ol>
</ol>
<span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;">

</span><br />
<div style="font-size: 11pt; margin: 0in 0in 0in 1.125in;">
<br /></div>
<span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;">

</span><br />
<div style="font-size: 11pt; margin: 0in;">
<br /></div>
<span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;">

</span><br />
<div style="font-size: 11pt; margin: 0in;">
<br /></div>
<span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;">

</span><br />
<div style="font-size: 11pt; margin: 0in;">
<br /></div>
<span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;">

</span><br />
<h4 style="font-size: 11pt; margin: 0in;">
<span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;">Where do you go? </span></h4>
<span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;">

</span><br />
<div style="font-size: 11pt; margin: 0in;">
<br /></div>
<div style="font-size: 11pt; margin: 0in;">
<br /></div>
<span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;">

</span><br />
<ul style="direction: ltr; margin-bottom: 0in; margin-left: .375in; margin-top: 0in; unicode-bidi: embed;" type="disc">
<li style="margin-bottom: 0; margin-top: 0; vertical-align: middle;"><span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;"><span style="font-size: 11pt;">County Tax Office. You'll be
     taking your paperwork to your local county tax office. Yes, that's right.
     Not the "DMV", but a tax office. </span></span></li>
<li style="margin-bottom: 0; margin-top: 0; vertical-align: middle;"><span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;"><span style="font-size: 11pt;">Where is that? The </span><a href="http://www.txdmv.gov/motorists/new-to-texas"><span style="font-size: 11pt;">TXDMV.Gov</span></a><span style="font-size: 11pt;"> website has a handy tool to look up your County
     Tax Office. BUT, you'll need to know what county you are in to use it. </span></span></li>
<li style="margin-bottom: 0; margin-top: 0; vertical-align: middle;"><span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;"><span style="font-size: 11pt;">You can check what count you
     are in on the </span><a href="http://quickfacts.census.gov/cgi-bin/qfd/lookup"><span style="font-size: 11pt;">US Census</span></a><span style="font-size: 11pt;"> website. </span></span></li>
</ul>
<span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;">

</span><br />
<div style="font-size: 11pt; margin: 0in;">
<br /></div>
<span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;">

</span><br />
<span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;">

</span><br />
<div style="font-size: 11pt; margin: 0in;">
<br /></div>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
</div>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
</div>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
</div>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/tax-office-locator-7a88b38c18b3.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/tax-office-locator-7a88b38c18b3.jpg" /></a></div>
<br />
<h4>
<span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;">

</span></h4>
<h4 style="font-size: 11pt; margin: 0in;">
<span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;">&nbsp;</span></h4>
<h4 style="font-size: 11pt; margin: 0in;">
<span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;">How Much Will I Pay?</span></h4>
<span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;">

</span><br />
<div style="font-size: 11pt; margin: 0in;">
<br /></div>
<span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;">

</span><br />
<div style="font-size: 11pt; margin: 0in;">
<br /></div>
<div style="font-size: 11pt; margin: 0in;">
<span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;">From the&nbsp;</span><span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;"><span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;"><span style="font-size: 11pt;"> </span><a href="http://www.txdmv.gov/motorists/new-to-texas"><span style="font-size: 11pt;">TXDMV.Gov</span></a><span style="font-size: 11pt;"></span></span>
website (as of 02/08/15):</span></div>
<span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;">

</span><br />
<div style="font-size: 11pt; margin: 0in;">
<br /></div>
<span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;">

</span><br />
<ul style="direction: ltr; margin-bottom: 0in; margin-left: .375in; margin-top: 0in; unicode-bidi: embed;" type="disc">
<li style="margin-bottom: 0; margin-top: 0; vertical-align: middle;"><span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;"><span style="font-size: 11pt;">$50.75 - The base registration fee in
     Texas is $50.75 </span></span></li>
<li style="margin-bottom: 0; margin-top: 0; vertical-align: middle;"><span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;"><span style="font-size: 11pt;">Plus $1 for TexasSure, the
     electronic insurance verification program and other Department of Public
     Safety initiatives, </span></span></li>
<li style="margin-bottom: 0; margin-top: 0; vertical-align: middle;"><span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;"><span style="font-size: 11pt;">Plus $1 for improvements to
     the registration and titling computer system. </span></span></li>
<li style="margin-bottom: 0; margin-top: 0; vertical-align: middle;"><span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;"><span style="font-size: 11pt;">$52.75 - So, total state registration
     is $52.75 but counties may add other fees to this cost. </span></span></li>
<li style="margin-bottom: 0; margin-top: 0; vertical-align: middle;"><span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;"><span style="font-size: 11pt;">In addition, as a new
     resident, you also will pay sales tax-related fees required by the state's
     Comptroller of Public Accounts. Sales tax fees on a vehicle can be $90 or
     the difference between your previous state's sales tax and the Texas sales
     tax.</span></span></li>
<li style="margin-bottom: 0; margin-top: 0; vertical-align: middle;"><span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;"><span style="font-size: 11pt;">In addition, on a new
     purchase, you will calculate sales tax as the purchase price, or the
     Standard Presumptive Value (SPV) based on their calculations. You can
     access the SPV calculator on the website using the VIN and Odometer. Based
     on that value, find out what the sales tax is for your county, and factor
     that in to the total cost.&nbsp;</span></span><br />
<br />
<span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;"><span style="font-size: 11pt;"><b>Other costs may apply, check their website for most current information.&nbsp; </b></span></span></li>
</ul>
<span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;">

</span><br />
<div style="font-size: 11pt; margin: 0in;">
<br /></div>
<span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;">

</span><br />
<div style="font-size: 11pt; margin: 0in;">
<br /></div>
<span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;">

</span><br />
<div style="font-size: 11pt; margin: 0in;">
<br /></div>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/value-1dd773454a3f.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/value-1dd773454a3f.jpg" width="254" /></a></div>
<br />
<span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;">

</span><br />
<div style="font-size: 11pt; margin: 0in;">
<br /></div>
<br />
<span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;"><br /></span>
<span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;"><b>Life In Fort Worth By <a href="https://plus.google.com/+DarrellWolfe" target="_blank">Darrell Wolfe</a></b></span><br />
<span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;">
Blog Connect:</span><br />
<ul>
<li><span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;"><a href="http://www.lifeinfortworth.com/" target="_blank">www.LifeInFortWorth.com</a></span></li>
<li><span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;"><a href="https://www.facebook.com/LifeInFortWorth" target="_blank">Facebook.Com/LifeInFortWorth</a></span></li>
<li><span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;"><a href="http://twitter.com/DarrellWolfe" target="_blank">Twitter.Com/DarrellWolfe</a></span></li>
<li><span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;"><a href="https://plus.google.com/b/103906191345996094295/+LifeInFortWorthBlog/posts" target="_blank">Google+ LifeInFortWorth</a></span></li>
<li><span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;">Flickr:&nbsp;<a href="http://www.flickr.com/photos/darrellwolfe/sets/72157639481468746/" target="_blank">LIF Master Set</a></span></li>
<li><span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;">Urban Spoon:&nbsp;<a href="http://www.urbanspoon.com/br/13/6359/life-in-fort-worth-dallas-fort-worth" target="_blank">Life In Fort Worth</a></span></li>
<li><span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;">Yelp:&nbsp;<a href="http://lifeinwortworth.yelp.com/" target="_blank">LifeInFortWorth.Yelp.Com</a></span></li>
</ul>
<span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;">
Connect:</span><br />
<div style="clear: both; float: left; padding-bottom: 10px; text-align: left;">
<span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;"><a href="https://www.facebook.com/DarrellGWolfe"><img alt="Follow me on Facebook" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/facebook-icon-5eb48148a2fd.png" style="border-bottom: 0px; border-left: 0px; border-right: 0px; border-top: 0px; height: 32px; margin-left: 5px; margin-right: 5px; width: 32px;" /> </a><a href="https://twitter.com/DarrellWolfe"><img alt="Follow  &lt;b&gt;YOUR-TWITTER-ACCOUNT-NAME&lt;/b&gt; on Twitter" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/twitter-logo-edc9e1cba163.png" style="border-bottom: 0px; border-left: 0px; border-right: 0px; border-top: 0px; height: 33px; margin-left: 5px; margin-right: 5px; width: 33px;" /> </a><a href="http://www.youtube.com/user/darrellgwolfe"><img alt="Follow YOUR-CHANNEL-ID on YouTube" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/youtube-icon-3ffb893d0144.jpg" style="border-bottom: 0px; border-left: 0px; border-right: 0px; border-top: 0px; height: 33px; margin-left: 5px; margin-right: 5px; width: 33px;" /> </a><a href="http://feeds.feedburner.com/TexasLivingInfo" rel="alternate" type="application/rss+xml"><img alt="RSS subscription icon" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/rss-logo-e84cbcff6e22.jpg" style="border-bottom: 0px; border-left: 0px; border-right: 0px; border-top: 0px; height: 33px; margin-left: 5px; margin-right: 5px; width: 33px;" /> </a></span></div>
<span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;"><br /></span>
<span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;"><br /></span>
<span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;">
Disclaimers<b>:</b></span><br />
<span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;"><i>* This information is AS IS. I make no 
assumptions to know everything, or be up to date. I am a fellow traveler
 passing on what I learn to you. If you need official assistance from a 
professional, please get that help from them.&nbsp;</i></span><br />
<span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;"><i><br /></i><i>*Affiliate
 Links may be included. In some instances I make money from the reviews 
of products or services I do here. In some cases I get a few freebies as
 well. Nevertheless, I only leave my honest reviews. This is how I see 
it. They can pay me to review, they can't pay me for how my review turns
 out. Please see my full disclosure list at: <a href="http://www.lifeinfortworth.com/p/about.html" target="_blank">Start Here - About</a>.&nbsp;</i></span>
